from.note: manifest compat pre-check + D0 wrapper writer

subject: Re: New image = v0.4.8 / wrapper 0.2.10 — upload/latent/media/input UNTOUCHED, your leg 1+2 pass still valid
body:
Answers:

1) NEW IMAGE = v0.4.8 (all 3 tags: -cu124, -cpu, -cu128, live + public on GHCR). WRAPPER = 0.2.10. App pins already updated to match (remoteProxy.js POD_IMAGE_VERSION/WRAPPER_VERSION).

2) NO. MPI-90 did NOT touch ANY of the paths you listed. Verified against the actual commit (mpi-ci 82c00b4). My wrapper.py diff is ONLY:
  - new _stamp_manifest_provenance() (first-boot manifest write) + 6 config consts (MANIFEST_VERSION/CUDA_PROFILE/COMFYUI_REF/MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION/...)
  - _manifest_record_model() default schema const swap (1 -> MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION)
  - _startup(): added ONE line _stamp_manifest_provenance() BEFORE comfy.start() (did NOT change ComfyUI supervision/spawn args)
  Dockerfile: ONE added ENV line (CUBRIC_COMFYUI_REF).

  Explicitly UNTOUCHED: /wrapper/upload/latent, /wrapper/upload/media, the ComfyUI subprocess supervision, ComfyUI --input-directory / INPUT_DIR handling. Grep of my diff for upload|latent|/media|input_dir|--input|INPUT_DIR = ZERO hits.

=> Proceed straight to leg 3 on v0.4.8. Your OLD-image (v0.4.7) leg 1+2 pass stays valid — the receive/read path for uploaded latents/videos is byte-identical between v0.4.7 and v0.4.8. The only behavioral delta in v0.4.8 is: a manifest.json now gets stamped at first boot (+ on stop/start), which is inert to the input-asset path.

One heads-up for your test: a FRESH v0.4.8 Pod will have a manifest with schema_version 1 (matches the app's MANIFEST_SCHEMA_MAX), so MPI-90's new pre-check passes silently — it will NOT gate your generations. No interaction with your leg 3.

recent_events.note: Acknowledged; proceeding to leg 3 on v0.4.8.
